summary: Comprehensive routing/navigation refactor testing for ARENAKORE. Tested: navbar (9 items), footer (10 page links), 6 legacy redirects, 5 new canonical routes, Hero CTA link, GymPilotPage form, and Italian language switching. 14/15 test scenarios passed. One minor pre-existing CMS override issue with IT translation of 'FOR GYMS & COACHES' nav label.

minor.issue: 401 errors on CMS API calls visible in console on every page load. App handles gracefully with i18n/static fallback. 'Offline mode' badge not shown. Pre-existing issue, does not affect functionality.

integration_issues.flow: Italian language switch → navbar 'FOR GYMS & COACHES' label
integration_issues.issue: When switching to IT, the 'FOR GYMS & COACHES' nav link (nav_gyms CMS key) does NOT translate to 'PER PALESTRE & COACH'. This is because useGlobalContent(lang) returns the CMS-stored English value 'FOR GYMS & COACHES' which overrides the i18n fallback. Other nav items (ATLETI, COMPETIZIONE) DO translate correctly. Hero CTA secondary button correctly shows 'PER PALESTRE & COACH' (uses usePageContent which correctly falls back to i18n). The i18n key nav.forGymsCoaches='Per Palestre & Coach' exists in IT translations but is shadowed by CMS global content.

action_items: MINOR: Fix IT translation for nav 'FOR GYMS & COACHES' - the CMS global content key 'nav_gyms' stores an English-only value which overrides the i18n Italian 'Per Palestre & Coach'. Either add Italian CMS content for nav_gyms OR make useGlobalContent language-aware when falling back.
critical_code_review_comments: validateNavigation() correctly runs at startup and logs '[ROUTES] Validated 9 nav items, 14 routes. ✓' — ROUTES single source of truth is working
REDIRECTS map in App.js using Object.entries() correctly generates all 6 legacy <Navigate replace> redirects
Footer Pages column correctly uses ROUTES.* for all 10 links — no hardcoded paths
LandingPage hero secondary CTA uses ROUTES.gyms (/for-gyms-and-coaches) correctly
GymPilotPage loads at /for-gyms-and-coaches with pilot form (5 input fields present)
test_credentials: No auth required for public pages tested
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 legacy redirects verified working. Navbar: 9 items with correct canonical routes. Footer: 10 page items + 2 support items (no duplicates). All new canonical routes (/competition, /amrap, /crossfit, /gamification, /for-gyms-and-coaches) load correctly. validateNavigation() logs '9 nav items, 14 routes ✓' at startup. Known minor issue: IT language - 'FOR GYMS & COACHES' nav label stays English because CMS global content overrides i18n (pre-existing CMS issue). Hero CTA 'FOR GYMS & COACHES' correctly links to /for-gyms-and-coaches. GymPilotPage has pilot form with 5 inputs.
passing_tests: Navbar: exactly 9 items (HOME, ARENA SYSTEM, ATHLETES, COMPETITION, AMRAP, CROSSFIT, GAMIFICATION, FOR GYMS & COACHES, BLOG)
Navbar: no duplicates, no 'Business' or 'Pilot' label
Footer Pages column: exactly 10 items (Home through Get the App), no duplicates, no old routes
New route /for-gyms-and-coaches loads GymPilotPage with pilot form (5 inputs)
Hero CTA 'FOR GYMS & COACHES' links to and navigates to /for-gyms-and-coaches
IT language: most nav labels translate (ATLETI, COMPETIZIONE) — hero content in Italian
validateNavigation() logs '[ROUTES] Validated 9 nav items, 14 routes. ✓' at startup
failing_tests: IT language: 'FOR GYMS & COACHES' nav item does not translate to 'PER PALESTRE & COACH' — CMS override returns English value instead of falling back to i18n
